note: Mock answers for the _mta-sts.<domain> TXT lookup that gates MTA-STS policy fetch (RFC 8461). The `id` changes whenever the published policy changes; the sender re-fetches https://mta-sts.<domain>/.well-known/mta-sts.txt only when the id differs from its cached copy.

malformed.expectedTreatment: missing id => ignore, treat as no policy

policyBody.note: Body served at https://mta-sts.example.com/.well-known/mta-sts.txt for the 'present' case above.
policyBody.text:
version: STSv1
mode: enforce
mx: mx.example.com
max_age: 604800
